name: Beer & Cheddar Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the beer and chicken stock to a boil over moderate heat.
2. Simmer for 25 minutes.
3. Beat the egg yolks until thick and pale yellow.
4. Beat in the heavy cream.
5. Slowly add a little of the hot beer to the egg mixture, stirring constantly to prevent curdling.
6. Add the egg mixture and cheese to the remaining soup.
7. Heat for 5 minutes, but do not allow the soup to boil.
